# agenttoll.dev

Operator: Hu White (@huwhitememes)
Contact: memerhuwhite@gmail.com

Lead: Pay-per-call AI agent data tools. 100 tools across 10 categories. Agents pay $0.01-$0.10/call via x402 micropayments in USDC on Base. No API keys, no accounts, no subscriptions.

Buyer-agent summary: agenttoll.dev gives agents one entry point for callable OSINT, market intelligence, web intel, legal, academic, health, environmental, government, finance, and utility data tools. Every tool is paid via x402 — an agent requests data, gets HTTP 402 with a payment challenge, pays cents of USDC on Base, retries with proof, gets JSON back. No keys, no OAuth, no billing dashboard.

Start with `POST /paid/osint/usgs-quake` ($0.02), `POST /paid/osint/hn-frontpage` ($0.02), or `POST /paid/utility/crypto-price-simple` ($0.02). Then explore `/tools` for the full catalog.

Live payment protocol: x402. Chain: Base mainnet (eip155:8453). Facilitator: https://facilitator.payai.network (free, no-auth). Seller wallet: 0x62a0D3d9DF0dE8804983009949c714EaeAFd87F1.

Canonical pricing/status catalog: /.well-known/agent.json
OpenAPI spec: /openapi.json
x402 discovery manifest: /.well-known/x402
MCP endpoint: /mcp
Tools directory: /tools
Blog: /blog/x402-protocol-explained
Codebase: https://github.com/huwhitememes/tollbooth (open source)

MCP server: Connect any MCP-compatible agent to `https://agenttoll.dev/mcp`. Use `Accept: application/json, text/event-stream` with an `mcp-session-id` header. `initialize` → `notifications/initialized` → `tools/list` returns all 100 tools with pricing.

Free endpoints (no payment required):
- GET /api/info — service info and capabilities
- GET /tools — full tools directory (HTML)
- GET /tools/{tool-name} — individual tool detail page with pricing, inputs, example
- GET /openapi.json — full OpenAPI spec
- GET /.well-known/agent.json — agent discovery manifest (100 tools)
- GET /.well-known/x402 — x402 resource listing

## Quickstart (curl)

Unpaid request returns HTTP 402:

  curl -X POST https://agenttoll.dev/paid/osint/usgs-quake \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"limit": 10}'

Response:
  {"error":"payment_required","price_usd":"0.02","network":"eip155:8453","accepts":{"scheme":"exact","price":"$0.02","network":"eip155:8453","payTo":"0x62a0D3d9DF0dE8804983009949c714EaeAFd87F1"}}

Agent pays 0.02 USDC on Base to the payTo address, retries with X-Payment header, gets JSON data.

Quickstart (x402-fetch client):

  import { wrapFetchWithPayment } from "x402/fetch";
  import { createWalletClient, http } from "viem";
  import { base } from "viem/chains";
  import { privateKeyToAccount } from "viem/accounts";

  const account = privateKeyToAccount(process.env.AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY);
  const walletClient = createWalletClient({ account, chain: base, transport: http() });
  const fetchWithPayment = wrapFetchWithPayment(fetch, walletClient,
    { facilitatorUrl: "https://facilitator.payai.network" });

  const response = await fetchWithPayment("https://agenttoll.dev/paid/osint/usgs-quake",
    { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ limit: 10 }) });

## Market Intelligence (10 tools)

Prediction market scanning for Polymarket and Kalshi — arbitrage detection, orderbook analysis, trending markets, smart money tracking.
- POST /paid/polymarket/event-scan — Scan one Polymarket negRisk event for arbitrage. $0.03
- POST /paid/polymarket/market-scan — Scan high-volume Polymarket markets for resolution candidates. $0.05
- POST /paid/markets/cross-platform-scan — Match Polymarket and Kalshi markets for cross-platform arbitrage. $0.10
- POST /paid/polymarket/rebalance-scan — Single-market rebalance arbitrage (YES+NO pricing violations). $0.04
- POST /paid/polymarket/trending — Top trending Polymarket markets by 24h volume. $0.02
- POST /paid/polymarket/odds-feed — Normalized live odds across Polymarket and Kalshi. $0.02
- POST /paid/polymarket/volume-analytics — Markets ranked by 24h volume with liquidity depth. $0.03
- POST /paid/polymarket/resolution-history — Recently resolved markets with final outcomes. $0.03
- POST /paid/polymarket/orderbook-imbalance — CLOB orderbook imbalance as directional signal. $0.05
- POST /paid/polymarket/smart-money — Leaderboard top traders, current positions, ROI. $0.10

## OSINT (14 tools)

Open-source intelligence feeds — GDELT, ADS-B, SEC, Treasury, HN, GitHub, USGS, OpenAQ, OpenRouter. Cron-pre-warmed via Cloudflare KV for sub-50ms cache hits.
- POST /paid/osint/attention-momentum — HN frontpage + Reddit velocity + pypistats/npm/crates momentum score. $0.02
- POST /paid/osint/flight-intel — Live military/exec jet intel via adsb.lol. $0.02
- POST /paid/osint/geo-pulse — Composite geo/military tension signal: GDELT + BBC/AlJazeera + ADS-B. $0.05
- POST /paid/osint/github-trending — GitHub trending repos by stars + recent activity. $0.02
- POST /paid/osint/hn-frontpage — HN frontpage with dwell scoring. $0.02
- POST /paid/osint/openaq-air — OpenAQ air quality readings by city/country. $0.02
- POST /paid/osint/openrouter-models — OpenRouter model catalog with pricing. $0.02
- POST /paid/osint/research-pack — Literature discovery factory: GDELT + BBC RSS + HN + arXiv. $0.04
- POST /paid/osint/regulatory-pulse — FDA + trials + USPTO + FCC + FAA + SEC composite. $0.03
- POST /paid/osint/scenario-verdict — 3-scenario verdict.json with escalation probabilities. $0.05
- POST /paid/osint/sec-8k-velocity — SEC EDGAR 8-K filing spike detection. $0.03
- POST /paid/osint/supply-stress — Port/chokepoint stress: CBP + GDELT + AIS + BTS. $0.03
- POST /paid/osint/treasury-dts — Treasury TGA operating cash balance. $0.04
- POST /paid/osint/usgs-quake — USGS earthquakes M2.5+ last 24h. $0.02
- POST /paid/osint/weather-bias — Open-Meteo archive vs forecast bias for Kalshi weather markets. $0.03

Court records, patents, trademarks, federal regulations — CourtListener, Google Patents, USPTO, Federal Register.

- POST /paid/legal/federal-register — Search daily Federal Register. $0.03

- POST /paid/legal/regulations-search — Search open rulemakings and public dockets. $0.03
- POST /paid/legal/judges-search — Search federal and state judges. $0.04
- POST /paid/legal/trademarks-search — Search USPTO trademark database. $0.03

- POST /paid/academic/citation-graph — Forward/backward citation graph. $0.03

FDA adverse events, drug recalls, product recalls, disease outbreaks — openFDA, CPSC, NHTSA, CDC.

- POST /paid/health/food-recall-check — Food recalls by brand or product. $0.02

## Environmental & Climate (12 tools)

Wildfires, weather, tides, space weather, air quality, marine conditions — NASA, NOAA, USGS, Open-Meteo.
- POST /paid/env/wildfires — Active wildfire detections from NASA FIRMS. $0.03
- POST /paid/env/weather-alerts — Active NOAA NWS severe weather alerts. $0.02
- POST /paid/env/tide-data — NOAA tide predictions and observed water levels. $0.03
- POST /paid/env/space-weather — NOAA solar flares, geomagnetic storms, Kp index. $0.02
- POST /paid/env/water-levels — Real-time USGS river/stream flow and flood data. $0.03
- POST /paid/env/space-weather-kp — Current planetary K-index and storm conditions. $0.03
- POST /paid/env/weather-forecast-grid — 7-day NWS forecast for any US coordinate. $0.02
- POST /paid/env/weather-current-global — Current weather for any global coordinate. $0.02
- POST /paid/env/aurora-forecast — NOAA aurora oval 30-minute forecast. $0.03
- POST /paid/env/marine-conditions — Wave height, sea temperature for any ocean coordinate. $0.03
- POST /paid/env/air-quality-index — PM2.5, UV, ozone, NO2 for any global location. $0.03
- POST /paid/env/weather-bias-score — Open-Meteo archive vs forecast bias for weather markets. $0.03

$6T+ federal budget, contracts, grants, lobbying, nonprofits, national debt — USAspending, Treasury, Grants.gov, FEC, ProPublica, World Bank.

- POST /paid/gov/federal-grants — Search Grants.gov open funding opportunities. $0.03
- POST /paid/gov/nonprofit-filings — Search nonprofit IRS 990 filings. $0.03

SEC EDGAR, Form 4 insider trades, FRED economic data, currency rates, crypto prices, Bitcoin mempool.

- POST /paid/finance/business-days — Business day calculator with US federal holidays. $0.01
- POST /paid/utility/crypto-price-simple — Current crypto price in USD for any CoinGecko coin. $0.02
- POST /paid/utility/btc-mempool-fees — Bitcoin network fees (fastest, half-hour, hour, economy). $0.02
- POST /paid/utility/btc-address-balance — Bitcoin address balance and transaction history. $0.03

## Web Intelligence (7 tools)

Scrape, tech stack detection, lead scoring, contact extraction, agent policy checks.
- POST /paid/web/scrape — Fetch URL, return structured metadata, headings, links, text. $0.01
- POST /paid/web/detect-stack — Fingerprint URL for framework, analytics, hosting, payments. $0.02
- POST /paid/web/extract-contacts — Extract emails, phones, social links from a URL. $0.02
- POST /paid/web/score-lead — Score a company domain for outbound fit. $0.03
- POST /paid/web/enrich-lead — Enrich company domain with metadata, tech, social. $0.05
- POST /paid/web/check-agent-policy — Check robots.txt, llms.txt, agent.json for discovery signals. $0.01
- POST /paid/web/find-agent-resource — Search curated atlas of agent-useful APIs and tools. $0.01

Live community intelligence from 1.2M+ generative video practitioners — workflows, settings, model comparisons.
- POST /paid/genvideo/gen-video-intel — Model names, capabilities, pricing, workflows, gotchas. $0.05
- POST /paid/genvideo/model-settings-lookup — Recommended settings per model (temp, top_p, etc). $0.02

## Utility (6 tools)

DNS, geolocation, timezone, airport status, postal codes, ISBN lookup.
- POST /paid/utility/dns-records-lookup — DNS via Cloudflare DoH (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME). $0.02
- POST /paid/utility/ip-geolocation — Geolocate IP: country, city, ISP, ASN, coordinates. $0.02
- POST /paid/utility/timezone-current — Current date/time for any IANA timezone. $0.01
- POST /paid/utility/airport-status — Airport details by ICAO code. $0.02
- POST /paid/utility/postal-code-lookup — City, state, geo for postal/zip codes, 60+ countries. $0.02
- POST /paid/utility/isbn-book-lookup — Book metadata by ISBN via Open Library. $0.02

## Architecture

Runs on Cloudflare Workers + TypeScript. Durable Objects power the MCP server. KV namespace (tollbooth-cache) with */15 cron pre-warming for sub-50ms cache hits on OSINT feeds. Static assets served via Workers ASSETS binding. No backend servers to manage.

Every paid tool touches five layers: payment middleware config, HTTP route handler, MCP tool registration, discovery manifest entry, and OpenAPI spec path. The codebase at github.com/huwhitememes/tollbooth documents this pattern in full.
